title: Transcription
description: Offline speech-to-text. Dependencies install themselves on first use.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: whisper.cpp model id (ggml-<model>.bin). small = multilingual, good balance. base = faster/lighter; medium / large-v3 = more accurate, slower.

fields.label: Language hint
fields.description: BCP-47 code (e.g. en, ru). auto detects the language per clip.
